name: @multicode/ue
description: UE-specific nodes for Blueprint-like workflows in MultiCode
descriptionRu: UE-специфичные узлы для Blueprint-подобных графов в MultiCode

nodes.label: Event Begin Play
nodes.description: Entry point of the graph

nodes.label: Event Tick
nodes.description: Called every frame

nodes.label: Event Begin Overlap
nodes.description: Fired when another actor begins overlapping
nodes.descriptionRu: Срабатывает при начале перекрытия с другим actor

nodes.label: Event End Overlap
nodes.description: Fired when another actor stops overlapping
nodes.descriptionRu: Срабатывает при окончании перекрытия с другим actor

nodes.label: Event Hit
nodes.description: Fired when this actor hits or is hit by something
nodes.descriptionRu: Срабатывает при столкновении с другим объектом

nodes.label: Spawn Actor
nodes.description: Spawn an actor by class

nodes.label: Destroy Actor
nodes.description: Destroy the specified actor

nodes.label: Get Actor Location
nodes.description: Get the actor's world location

nodes.label: Set Actor Location
nodes.description: Set the actor's world location

nodes.label: Get Actor Rotation
nodes.description: Get the actor's world rotation

nodes.label: Set Actor Rotation
nodes.description: Set the actor's world rotation

nodes.label: Get Actor Scale
nodes.description: Get the actor's world scale

nodes.label: Set Actor Scale
nodes.description: Set the actor's world scale

nodes.label: Get Actor Forward Vector
nodes.description: Get the forward direction vector of the actor

nodes.label: Add Actor Local Offset
nodes.description: Add a delta to the actor's location in local space
nodes.descriptionRu: Добавить смещение к позиции actor в локальных координатах

nodes.label: Get Player Controller
nodes.description: Get the player controller for the given player index

nodes.label: Get Player Pawn
nodes.description: Get the pawn for the given player index

nodes.label: Get Player Character
nodes.description: Get the character for the given player index

nodes.label: Get Player Camera Manager
nodes.description: Get the camera manager for the given player index
nodes.descriptionRu: Получить менеджер камеры игрока по индексу

nodes.label: Get Component By Class
nodes.description: Get the first component of the specified class on an actor
nodes.descriptionRu: Получить первый компонент указанного класса у actor

nodes.label: Is Valid
nodes.description: Check if an object pointer is valid (not null and not pending kill)
nodes.descriptionRu: Проверить, является ли указатель на объект валидным

nodes.label: Cast To
nodes.description: Cast an object to the specified class

nodes.label: Print String
nodes.description: Print a string to screen and/or log
nodes.descriptionRu: Вывести строку на экран и/или в лог

nodes.label: UE Log
nodes.description: Write a message to the UE log with a specified verbosity
nodes.descriptionRu: Записать сообщение в лог UE с указанным уровнем

nodes.label: Delay
nodes.description: Latent action — wait for a specified duration

nodes.label: Set Timer by Event
nodes.description: Set a recurring or one-shot timer

nodes.label: Get World
nodes.description: Get a reference to the current UWorld

nodes.label: Get Game Mode
nodes.description: Get the current game mode

nodes.label: Get Game Instance
nodes.description: Get the game instance

nodes.label: Get Actor Of Class
nodes.description: Find the first actor of the specified class in the world
nodes.descriptionRu: Найти первый actor указанного класса в мире

nodes.label: Get All Actors Of Class
nodes.description: Find all actors of the specified class in the world
nodes.descriptionRu: Найти все actor указанного класса в мире

nodes.label: Make Vector
nodes.description: Construct an FVector from X, Y, Z components
nodes.descriptionRu: Создать FVector из компонентов X, Y, Z

nodes.label: Break Vector
nodes.description: Break an FVector into X, Y, Z components
nodes.descriptionRu: Разбить FVector на компоненты X, Y, Z

nodes.label: Make Rotator
nodes.description: Construct an FRotator from Pitch, Yaw, Roll
nodes.descriptionRu: Создать FRotator из Pitch, Yaw, Roll

nodes.label: Break Rotator
nodes.description: Break an FRotator into Pitch, Yaw, Roll
nodes.descriptionRu: Разбить FRotator на Pitch, Yaw, Roll

nodes.label: Make Transform
nodes.description: Construct an FTransform from location, rotation, and scale
nodes.descriptionRu: Создать FTransform из позиции, поворота и масштаба

nodes.label: Vector Length
nodes.description: Get the length of an FVector

nodes.label: Normalize Vector
nodes.description: Get a normalized copy of the vector

nodes.label: Vector + Vector
nodes.description: Add two FVectors

nodes.label: Vector * Float
nodes.description: Multiply an FVector by a scalar

nodes.label: Dot Product
nodes.description: Compute the dot product of two vectors

nodes.label: Cross Product
nodes.description: Compute the cross product of two vectors

nodes.label: Lerp
nodes.description: Linearly interpolate between A and B based on Alpha
nodes.descriptionRu: Линейная интерполяция между A и B по Alpha

nodes.label: Clamp
nodes.description: Clamp a value between min and max
nodes.descriptionRu: Ограничить значение между минимумом и максимумом

nodes.label: Get Distance To
nodes.description: Get distance between two actors

nodes.label: Line Trace By Channel
nodes.description: Perform a line trace (raycast) against the world

nodes.label: Set Enable Collision
nodes.description: Enable or disable collision for an actor

nodes.label: Set Actor Hidden
nodes.description: Set whether the actor is hidden in game
nodes.descriptionRu: Скрыть или показать actor в игре

nodes.label: Get Actor Tags
nodes.description: Get the tags assigned to the actor

nodes.label: Actor Has Tag
nodes.description: Check if actor has a specific tag
